results.title: Timely Alternatives Worth Your Time: Paid & Free Apps Reviewed
results.content:
If you’re looking for something more involved in your work day than Timely, Time Doctor might be the app for you. Just be aware that your focus and productivity can be put under the microscope. 🤷

### #4 Toggl Track

🔄 Why it’s a Timely alternative:  
 Toggl Track is a Timely alternative for people who want lightweight, manual time tracking without AI or surveillance.  
  
 💻 Availability: Web, desktop (Windows, Mac, and Linux), mobile apps, browser extensions.  
  
 💸 Pricing:  
 Toggl Track offers a free forever plan with basic features, and paid plans start at $9/user/month.

Toggl Track is like the cool, laidback manager who gives you full control over your time without being nosy about it. [...] ### #1 Memtime

🔄 Why it’s a Timely alternative:  
 Memtime offers fully automatic time tracking (just like Timely) but with a stronger focus on data privacy, transparency, and user control. It’s ideal for those who want the benefits of automation without AI.  
  
 💻 Availability: Desktop only (Windows, macOS, and Linux).  
  
 💸 Pricing:  
 There’s a 14-day free trial, with paid plans starting at $11/user/month. There are also discounted rates for annual and biannual billing.

Memtime is a desktop-based time tracking app that runs oh-so-quietly in the background, capturing every second you spend working on your computer. It logs activity across apps, websites, documents, and even VoIP calls, all without requiring you to start or stop a timer. [...] ### #3 Time Doctor

🔄 Why it’s a Timely alternative:  
 Time Doctor offers time tracking with productivity monitoring and distraction management; it’s a good option if you want more control over your team.  
  
 💻 Availability: Web, desktop (Mac, Windows), mobile apps (iOS, Android), and browser extensions.  
  
 💸 Pricing:  
 Time Doctor starts at $6.70/user/month for the Basic plan, with more advanced monitoring features in higher tiers.

If Timely is like a quiet time tracking assistant, Time Doctor is more like a digital doctor with a magnifying glass (perhaps a bit too nosey). That’s not necessarily a bad thing if you’re looking for more accountability across remote teams or billable client work.

results.title: Timely - Definition, Meaning & Synonyms | Vocabulary.com
results.content:
Vocabulary.com

# timely

Other forms: timeliest; timelier; timelily

If something is finished quickly or on time, then it's been done in a timely manner. Homework, thank-you notes, and your taxes are just a few things that you should complete in a timely manner.

Hear that clock ticking? That's the time limit for learning this word in a timely fashion. But the word timely isn't always about speed — being timely can also mean being well-timed or doing something at the most appropriate moment. If you're going for a job interview, it's important to make a timely arrival. And if you bump into friends just when they were wondering how you were doing, then you've made a timely appearance.
